creator: grog@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175593
Chrome screen on startup

Since upgrading to the chromium-52.0.2743.116_1 package, the headers have been corrupted and bright yellow.  I have heard from Peter Jeremy <peterj@> that he has had the same issue with chromium-52.0.2743.116.  I then built chromium-52.0.2743.116_2 from source, using the default build parameters, and the problem persists.

I have also removed the ~/.cache/chromium and ~/.config/chromium directories and restarted, but the problem persists.
